tags.name: Payment Service
tags.description: Operations for processing payments and retrieving available payment methods.

tags.name: Subscription Service
tags.description: Operations for managing subscriptions and stored payment methods.

tags.name: Recurring Service
tags.description: Operations for setting up and managing recurring payments.

tags.name: Order Service
tags.description: Operations for retrieving order and receipt details.

post.description: Accepts payment details and processes the transaction.

200.description: Payment request processed successfully. The payment may be approved or declined. Check the response status for the transaction outcome.

post.description: Returns a list of available payment methods, along with their corresponding fees.
Retrieves receipt details for a completed order using the orderId.
Retrieves order details for the specified orderId.
Gets the stored payment methods associated with a subscriptionId
Updates email and phone number associated with a subscriptionId
Deletes the stored payment method associated with a referenceId
Adds identities and associates them with a subscriptionId, while overwritting the previously added identities
Sets up a recurring payment using the specified subscription, stored payment method, item, and schedule.

404.description: Subscription or stored payment method not found

post.description: Retrieves the configuration and status of a recurring payment for the provided recurring ID.
Cancels an active recurring payment and stops future billing cycles for the specified recurring ID.
Retrieves all the recurring payment items associated with a subscriptionId.

200.description: Retrived the recurring payment details successfully

post.description: Retrieves all the recurring payments associated with a subscriptionId and recurringId.

200.description: Retrived the recurring payment history successfully

additionalProperties.description:
Payment details for the selected payment type.

For creditcard, provide:
- encryptedCardNumber
- encryptedSecurityCode
- encryptedExpiryMonth
- encryptedExpiryYear
- cardHolderName

For echeck, provide:
- accountNumber
- routingNumber
- either firstName and lastName, or businessName

shopperPaymentInfo.description:
Payment details for the selected payment type.

For creditcard, provide:
- encryptedCardNumber
- encryptedSecurityCode
- encryptedExpiryMonth
- encryptedExpiryYear
- cardHolderName

For echeck, provide:
- accountNumber
- routingNumber
- either firstName and lastName, or businessName

storePaymentMethod.description: Whether the entered payment method should be stored for future use. If true and subscriptionId is not provided, a new subscriptionId is created during payment processing.

Payment.description:
Payment information used to process a transaction.

Use payment.type to indicate the payment method.

If using a stored payment method, provide storedPaymentMethodId in the request and do not provide shopperPaymentInfo.

If not using a stored payment method, provide shopperPaymentInfo based on payment.type.

Supported payment.type values in this document:
- creditcard
- echeck

items.description: List of items to be paid. Do not include this field when the request is intended only for payment method tokenization.

storedPaymentMethodId.description: Identifier of a previously stored payment method, such as a credit card or bank account. When provided, the payment is processed using the stored payment method.

subscriptionId.description: Unique subscription identifier associated with the customer and payment method. Provide this field to use an existing subscription. If storePaymentMethod is true and this field is not provided, a new subscriptionId is created during payment processing.

PaymentRequest.description:
Request used to process a payment transaction.

Provide payment information in the payment object.

If using a stored payment method, provide storedPaymentMethodId and do not provide shopperPaymentInfo.

If not using a stored payment method, provide shopperPaymentInfo based on payment.type.

Include items when processing a payment.

Do not include items when the request is intended only for payment method tokenization.

If storePaymentMethod is true and subscriptionId is not provided, a new subscriptionId is created during payment processing and returned in the response.

If subscriptionId is provided, the payment method is associated with the existing subscription.

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the payment transaction.

paymentTimestamp.description: Date and time when the payment transaction was processed.

amount.description: Base payment amount for the transaction, excluding fees.

feeAmount.description: Fee amount applied to the transaction.

totalAmount.description: Total amount charged for the transaction, including fees.

subscriptionId.description: Unique subscription identifier associated with the customer. Returned when an existing subscription is used, or when a new subscriptionId is created because storePaymentMethod is true and subscriptionId was not provided in the request.

storedPaymentMethodId.description: Identifier of the stored payment method. Returned when storePaymentMethod is true and the payment method is successfully stored.

errorMessage.description: Error message returned when the transaction fails.

errorDetails.description: Detailed error information for troubleshooting purposes.

storePaymentMethodStatus.description: Status of storing the payment method. Returned only when storePaymentMethod is true in the request.

retry.description: Indicates whether the payment attempt can be retried.

PaymentResponse.description:
Response returned after a payment transaction is processed.

For successful payments, orderId and status are returned.

If the payment method was requested to be stored, storePaymentMethodStatus indicates whether the payment method was stored successfully.

If the transaction fails, errorMessage and errorDetails may be returned.

retry indicates whether the payment attempt can be retried.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used in the order.

cardHolderName.description: Card holder name when payment is made by card.

cardSummary.description: Masked card number summary shown to the customer.

cardType.description: Card brand or type, for example Visa or MasterCard.

expiryDate.description: Card expiration date in display format.

bankAccountSummary.description: Masked bank account summary when payment is made by bank account.

bankAccountName.description: Name on the bank account used for payment.

paymentAmount.description: Total paid amount for the order.

feeItems.description: List of fee-related items included in the receipt.

customer.description: Customer information associated with the order.

bearerAuth.description: Use the JWT access token issued by the TPE Auth server. Obtain a token via the TPE Auth API (see https://civitek.github.io/open-api-docs/tpe-auth.html) then include it as: Authorization: Bearer <token>
